title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that competing with AI on knowledge is unwinnable for humans, and that true intelligence in the AI age lies in curiosity and human judgment rather than knowledge accumulation. He uses Ramanujan's legacy to illustrate how exceptional mathematical talent often emerges outside institutional systems.
